title: eragrostis cilianensis subsp. thyrsiflora
intro: Eragrostis cilianensis subsp. thyrsiflora, also known as tufted love grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis cilianensis subsp. thyrsiflora typically involve drying the plant material, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
